text:
# pkg audit -F FreeBSD-kernel-13.1_6
Fetching vuln.xml.xz: 100%  996 KiB   1.0MB/s    00:01

# pkg audit FreeBSD-13.1_6
0 problem(s) in 0 installed package(s) found.

There should be an information about CVE-2023-0286, CVE-2023-0215, CVE-2022-4450 and CVE-2022-4304 at least.
Also periodic security (405.pkg-base-audit) reports are incomplete because of the bug.

Reference:
https://www.freebsd.org/security/advisories/FreeBSD-SA-23:03.openssl.asc
